summary: Provision new Storage Gateway registrations — file (S3-backed NFS/SMB), volume (CACHED/STORED iSCSI), or tape (VTL). Greenfield today (no gateway exists yet in this estate) — the create registers an already-deployed gateway host; file shares/volumes/tape pools are provisioned as engineer follow-ups on top of it.

operations.title: Provision a new Storage Gateway
operations.summary: Request a brand-new gateway registration; an engineer finalizes and reviews the Terraform before it applies.
operations.description: Register a Storage Gateway appliance as a complete specification: gateway type, timezone, and activation. The gateway host (EC2 AMI, on-premises VM, or hardware appliance) must already be deployed and running so its activation key is available. Submitting routes it to an engineer with a draft Terraform block to review and finish — nothing is applied without review.

params.name: gateway_name
params.label: Gateway name
params.help: Names the gateway in the Storage Gateway console and the generated draft.

params.name: gateway_timezone
params.label: Gateway timezone
params.help: The gateway appliance's local timezone, used for its maintenance schedule.

params.name: gateway_type
params.label: Gateway type
params.help: FILE_S3 presents an NFS/SMB file share backed by S3; CACHED/STORED are iSCSI block volumes; VTL is a virtual tape library for backup software.

params.name: activation_key
params.label: Activation key
params.help: Obtained from the gateway appliance's local console/API after it is deployed and can reach the internet. Leave blank if the host isn't activated yet — an engineer completes this at review.

params.name: cloudwatch_log_group_arn
params.label: CloudWatch log group
params.help: Destination for the gateway's health/upload notification logs.

params.name: resource_name
params.label: Name tag
params.help: Shown as the name everywhere — consoles, tickets, this portal.

params.name: description_tag
params.label: What this gateway serves
params.help: One line an operator can act on at 3 AM.

params.name: pic
params.label: Person in charge
params.help: Who to call about this gateway.

decisions: The gateway host (EC2 instance, on-premises VM, or hardware appliance) must be deployed and running before its activation_key is available; this form provisions the aws_storagegateway_gateway resource that registers it.
SMB Active Directory join, bandwidth rate limits, and a private VPC endpoint are engineer follow-ups after creation.
